question_text: Let 𝑥1, 𝑥2, … , 𝑥𝑛 (𝑛≥2) be the observed values of a random sample from the following probability density function 𝑓(𝑥) = { Γ(𝛼) 𝑥𝛼−1𝑒−𝜆𝑥 if 𝑥> 0 0 otherwise, where 𝛼∈(0, ∞) and 𝜆∈(0, ∞) are unknown parameters. If 𝑥1 + 𝑥2 + ⋯+ 𝑥𝑛 = 2 and 𝑥1 2 + 𝑥2 2 + ⋯+ 𝑥𝑛 = 5, then the method of moments estimate of 𝛼 equals ________ (
